'''Nuri''' was an impoverished [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] who lived on the Banking planet of [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]]. Nuri had his finger on the pulse of information, knowing the value of it, and paying good money to have it. He frequently visited the [[Aargau Undercity]] where spies congregated to sell information. He was a rival of [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]], causing him to have a deep hatred of her. Being a [[Changeling/Legends|Changeling]], he posed as a [[Bimm (furred species)/Legends|Bimm]], and charged fees to be a tour guide, then scammed money off his marks while pretending to help them remove it from the bank system. He was able to scam an unfortunate young [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], costing him about 500,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. 

In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] [[Foreman/Legends|Foreman]] [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]] was [[Mission to Metalorn (Clone Wars)|captured]] and arrested by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] on [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]].<ref name="Star Wars: The New Droid Army">''[[Star Wars: The New Droid Army]]''</ref> After Tambor was relocated to the [[Prison/Legends|prison]] world [[Delrian/Legends|Delrian]], the Techno Union hired Nuri to lead a [[Mission to Delrian|rescue attempt]]. Nuri and two [[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]] [[Commando/Legends|Commandos]] disguised themselves as Tambor's legal deputies and were permitted to visit his cell. The two commandos killed Tambor's guards and blew open his cell by breaching their compressed [[Methane/Legends|methane]] [[Pressure suit/Legends|pressure suits]]. In the ensuing chaos, Nuri secured Tambor and used secret Techno Union devices to bypass the prison's security systems.<ref name="shadowfeed">{{InsiderCite|67|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 14:4:12 Edition}}</ref> After the successful rescue mission, Nuri remained in the Techno Union's employ as a guard in Wat Tambor's [[Mazariyan|fortress]] on [[Xagobah/Legends|Xagobah]].<ref name="Boba Fett: A New Threat">''[[Boba Fett: A New Threat]]''</ref>

Nuri would later confront Boba on Xagobah, turning into an [[Arrak snake]] to strangle him, and then a [[Dinko (creature)|Dinko]] to spray a foul smell in order to stun Boba before scuttling off as a [[Fefze beetle]], but Boba caught him and got his revenge by paralyzing him at least temporarily with a [[Xabar]] fungus.
